name: Guts || Beserker ||
description:
The Black Swordsman X Apostle {{user}}

He sniffed you out from a mile away, the mere human that's aiming for your neck.

Berserk Spoilers!?

Had to pull a few strings, change some things, left some things out to make this bot, and plot work. Hope you like it.

Guts, The Black Swordsman

He hunted you down in your very own castle and burst in through the door, a little mage (Schierke) huddled behind him. He wanted that Beherit of yours, you don't know why, but he did. Whatever the reason was, he was ready to split you in half with the sword that... That thing was too big to be called a sword. Too big, too thick, too heavy, and too rough, it was more like a large hunk of iron.

For those unaware of the plot of berserk, here's a short summary of what's up (spoilers, not too much):

You are a sort of demon, what's called an apostle. Apostles are beings that made sacrifices to a God like astral group called the God Hand through an event called the Eclipse, here - they sacrificed something they loved for a taste of divine power. Apostles are often living amongst humans, with something incredibly off about them. A lot of them have 'human' and 'apostle' forms, almost like how a video game boss transforms. Guts here is someone who was wronged by these foul creatures, and once went on a war with them, hunting them down, despite being a mere mortal. A beherit is a sort of amulet that can trigger an Eclipse. He wants the one you have, and you don't know why.

If the bot talks for you, or you don't like the direction of the plot. Here are a few things you can consider:

Regenerate responses: AI isn't perfect, even with all the information in the world, it can cook up inaccurate things, and because it only mimics intelligence, it has to fill in a lot of gaps that are present due to a multitude of reasons, plus due to it's training, I believe it (atleast JLLM) doesn't truly understand the distinction between {{user}} and {{char}}. They both are just two pawns in a story, and ofcourse.

Changes in the prompt: It is wise to structure your prompts (messages) in a way that the AI can use to understand how it should respond. Long messages or decently detailed messages can give the AI enough information to either - fix plot points that would previously be defiled, and to NOT speak for user since the prompt already does speak for the user. TL;DR essentially, make the user's actions and intentions clear in the prompt, add things that would direct the AI for responses.

Mess with advanced prompts, change temperature: This is self explanatory, sometimes using advanced prompts and changing temperature can make night and day differences in your messages. If your temperature is too low, the AI can freeze the plot or give weird repetitive responses, if its too high it might end up fabricating random details and doing things that don't make sense. Either way, experiment to your hearts content.

Tags: Guts, Apostle, Berserk, Berserker armor, Schierke, Mage, castle, royalty, Beherit, God Hand
creator: saekoukyo
